---
title: "Victoria Farkas"
subtitle: "Data Scientist"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    class: index-page
---

::: {#profile-section}
Hello, I'm

# Victoria Farkas {.profile-name}

Data Scientist

::: {.btn_container}
[Get To Know More](#about-section){.btn_color}
:::
:::

---

::: {#about-section}
::: {.section-label}
Get To Know More
:::

# About Victoria Farkas {.section-title}

::: {.text_container}
I have a background in Behavioural Neuroscience and my journey into data science is a natural evolution. I've always been drawn to problem-solving, and data provides the perfect canvas for my curious mind to explore and innovate.

What excites me most about this field is its constant evolution, dynamic challenges, and the continuous learning it demands. I bring an interdisciplinary approach rooted in research ethics, health policy, and statistical methodology—with 2+ years in population health data management at Population Data BC.

Beyond data, I lead in dance communities, direct events for Women in Data Science, and find balance through creative pursuits. These interests fuel creativity and keep me energized for data's challenges.
:::
:::

---

::: {#proficiencies-section}
::: {.section-label}
Here Are My
:::

# Proficiencies {.section-title}

::: {.proficiencies-intro}
I can optimize your data for better results and informed decisions. My proficiency in Python, R, SQL, and tools like scikit-learn, TensorFlow, and Tableau—combined with strong soft skills—enables me to deliver impactful data solutions.
:::

::: {.article_container}
::: {.proficiency-card}
### Data Analysis

Uncover hidden insights and patterns within your data to identify trends, anomalies, and opportunities for data-driven decision-making.
:::

::: {.proficiency-card}
### Data Analytics

Harness the power of advanced analytics, including predictive models and machine learning solutions to forecast outcomes and optimize processes.
:::

::: {.proficiency-card}
### Data Visualization

Transform complex data into clear and compelling visual narratives. Create custom dashboards and reports for enhanced data communication.
:::

::: {.proficiency-card}
### Technical Writing

Translate intricate technical concepts into clear documentation. From reports to tutorials, I ensure your data projects are well-documented.
:::

::: {.proficiency-card}
### Collaboration

Collaborate seamlessly to integrate data solutions into business processes. Whether short-term projects or ongoing initiatives, I'm here to support success.
:::
:::
:::

---

::: {#projects-section}
::: {.section-label}
Browse Through My
:::

# Projects {.section-title}

::: {.details_container}
::: {.project-card}
### [Survival of the Fittest (Model)](https://farkasvic.quarto.pub/survival-of-the-fittest-(model-optimizing-with-genetic-algorithms/))

Genetic algorithms for hyperparameter optimization—a hands-on tutorial comparing GA against Random Search for tuning a Random Forest classifier.

*Quarto · Python · scikit-learn*

[View Project →](https://farkasvic.quarto.pub/survival-of-the-fittest-(model-optimizing-with-genetic-algorithms/)){.project-link}
:::

::: {.project-card}
### BizInnovate — Pacific Conference on AI · **1st Place**

ML model predicting regional water quality from geospatial data and satellite imagery.

*Python · Geospatial · ML*

[View Projects](projects.qmd){.project-link}
:::

::: {.project-card}
### nwPlus 2024 Hackathon · **Track Winner**

Digital biomedical waste management system; top 3, Environmental & Sustainability track.

*Hackathon · Full-stack*

[View Projects](projects.qmd){.project-link}
:::

::: {.project-card}
### Sports Analytics Datathon · **Semi-Finalist**

Sole programmer; cleaned soccer club datasets to produce a revenue optimization recommendation.

*Python · Data Analysis*

[View Projects](projects.qmd){.project-link}
:::
:::

[View all projects →](projects.qmd){.btn_color .mt-3}
:::

---

::: {#platforms-section}
::: {.section-label}
Explore My
:::

# Other Platforms {.section-title}

::: {.platforms_container}
::: {.platform-card}
### [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/victoria-farkas-617262262)

Connect and follow my professional journey
:::

::: {.platform-card}
### [Quarto Pub](https://farkasvic.quarto.pub/)

Read my technical tutorials and insights
:::

::: {.platform-card}
### [GitHub](https://github.com/farkasvic)

All things code
:::
:::
:::

---

::: {#contact-section}
::: {.section-label}
Reach Out
:::

# Contact Me {.section-title}

::: {.contact-container}
::: {.contact-info}
## Contact Information

**Victoria Farkas**

Vancouver, BC

[victoriafarkas9@gmail.com](mailto:victoriafarkas9@gmail.com)

[LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/victoria-farkas-617262262)
:::
:::
:::
